hooks.command: composer run check >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'composer run check failed - task stays open until green' >&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: Verifying task via composer run check...

hooks.prompt: If any tasks in the shared list are still pending and unblocked, claim one and continue. Otherwise stay idle.

allow: Running composer run check or any subset of it
Running php artisan test with any filter
Running npm run dev, build, or test scripts
Creating, reading, or editing files under app/, resources/, tests/, database/, docs/
soft_deny: Committing to or pushing the main branch
Modifying .github/workflows without a failing test first
environment: Arcane Advisor: Laravel 13 + Vue 3 SPA, TDD-first. Red tests must land before implementation.
composer run check is the single green gate. No shortcuts around it.
